message:
feat(server,runtime): add --replicaof CLI flag and expand INFO replication for replica role

The server now accepts --replicaof <HOST> <PORT> to configure replica
mode at startup, dispatching REPLICAOF through the runtime before
entering the event loop. The INFO replication section is expanded to
report master_host, master_port, and master_link_status when running
as a replica, matching Redis's INFO output format.

- fr-server/main.rs: add --replicaof argument parsing with host/port
  validation; dispatch REPLICAOF command through runtime.execute_frame
  at startup; update help text with --replicaof documentation
- fr-runtime: refactor INFO replication section to branch on
  Master/Replica role; add master_host, master_port,
  master_link_status, master_last_io_seconds_ago, and
  master_sync_in_progress fields for replica role; change role field
  references from owned to borrowed
- fr-persist: adjust persistence integration for replica awareness
- fr-server/tests/tcp_e2e_test.rs: add E2E tests for --replicaof
  startup configuration and INFO replication output validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
